mapper.select:
SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM ps.arrival_at)::int AS hour, COUNT(*)::bigint AS arrivalCount, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN ps.status = 'closed' THEN ps.dwell_seconds ELSE GREATEST(0, FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - ps.arrival_at))))::bigint END ), 0)::bigint AS dwellSeconds FROM presence_sessions ps
GROUP BY EXTRACT(HOUR FROM ps.arrival_at) ORDER BY hour

SELECT p.id AS personId, p.display_name AS displayName, p.person_type::text AS personKind, p.employee_no AS employeeNo, COALESCE(array_to_string(p.tags, ','), '') AS tagsText, COALESCE(p.note, '') AS note, COALESCE(p.face_image_url, fp.image_url) AS face_image_url, bp.image_url AS body_image_url, latest.arrival_at AS lastSeenAt FROM persons p LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT ps.arrival_at FROM presence_sessions ps WHERE ps.person_id = p.id ORDER BY ps.arrival_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) latest ON TRUE LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT image_url FROM face_profiles WHERE person_id = p.id ORDER BY is_primary DESC, created_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) fp ON TRUE LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT image_url FROM body_profiles WHERE person_id = p.id ORDER BY is_primary DESC, created_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) bp ON TRUE ORDER BY p.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE persons SET display_name = #{displayName}, person_type = CAST(#{personType} AS person_type), employee_no = #{employeeNo}, tags = CASE WHEN #{tagsText} IS NULL OR #{tagsText} = '' THEN ARRAY[]::text[] ELSE string_to_array(#{tagsText}, ',') END, note = #{note}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{personId}
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM persons WHERE employee_no = #{employeeNo} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE presence_sessions SET person_id = #{toPersonId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE person_id = #{fromPersonId}
UPDATE behavior_logs SET person_id = #{toPersonId} WHERE person_id = #{fromPersonId}
UPDATE person_daily_attendance SET person_id = #{toPersonId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE person_id = #{fromPersonId}
UPDATE face_profiles SET person_id = #{toPersonId} WHERE person_id = #{fromPersonId}
UPDATE body_profiles SET person_id = #{toPersonId} WHERE person_id = #{fromPersonId}

UPDATE presence_sessions SET status = CAST(#{status} AS session_status), departure_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'closed' THEN COALESCE(departure_at, NOW()) ELSE NULL END, dwell_seconds = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'closed' THEN GREATEST(0, FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(departure_at, NOW()) - arrival_at))))::int ELSE NULL END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{sessionId}
mapper.select: SELECT person_id FROM presence_sessions WHERE track_key = #{trackKey} AND person_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY arrival_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO persons (display_name, person_type, employee_no, tags, note, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{displayName}, CAST(#{personType} AS person_type), #{employeeNo}, CASE WHEN #{tagsText} IS NULL OR #{tagsText} = '' THEN ARRAY[]::text[] ELSE string_to_array(#{tagsText}, ',') END, #{note}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM persons ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO face_profiles (person_id, embedding, image_url, is_primary, created_at) VALUES (#{personId}, array_fill(0.0::real, ARRAY[512])::vector(512), #{imageUrl}, TRUE, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE locations SET name = #{locationName}, is_active = COALESCE(#{isActive}, is_active) WHERE id = #{locationId}
